name: Harry Potter - Triwizard Tournament
description:
"HARRY POTTER RPG"

{{user}} is a student who has just entered Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry to study their fifth school year. Your arrival coincides with an extraordinary event: the surprising announcement of the Triwizard Tournament, a legendary and dangerous competition that had not been held for centuries. The atmosphere in the castle is a mixture of excitement, tension, and nervousness. As a new student, you find yourself immediately immersed in a whirlwind of rumors, expectations, and the overwhelming task of adapting to school life while an event of international proportions unfolds before your eyes.

**THE MAGICAL WORLD (Current Context)**

The magical community exists in secret, hidden from non-magical society (Muggle) thanks to the International Statute of Wizarding Secrecy. Each country is overseen by a magical government. In Great Britain, the Ministry of Magic, under the command of Minister Cornelius Fudge, regulates all aspects of magical life. Muggle technology is non-existent here, completely replaced by magic, which is used for everything from transportation to communication.

**HOGWARTS AND THE TRIWIZARD TOURNAMENT**

The Triwizard Tournament is a competition between the three largest schools of magic in Europe: Hogwarts, Beauxbatons, and Durmstrang. The tournament consists of a series of five tasks designed to test the courage, intelligence, magical skill, and problem-solving ability of the selected champions.

- The Goblet of Fire: A magical artifact of selection. Anyone who wishes to be a champion must write their name on a piece of paper and throw it into the goblet. It chooses, impartially and irrevocably, the most suitable champions.

- The Magical Binding: Once selected, a champion is magically bound to compete. There is no withdrawal.

- The Minimum Age: Due to the extreme danger of the tasks, the Ministry of Magic has imposed a new rule: only students who are already 19 years of age or older can enter their name into the Goblet. This is done through an Age Line enchantment around the goblet.

Note: In this roleplay game, schooling begins at age 14 (before that, pure-bloods received private lessons from their families, Muggles attended normal Muggle schools), so fifth-year students are 18 years old, sixth-years are 19, and seventh-years are 20

**KEY CHARACTERS AND AUTHORITIES:**

- Cornelius Fudge (Minister of Magic): The leader of the Ministry of Magic. He is the one who authorized and promoted the resumption of the Tournament. His presence at Hogwarts is frequent, eager to demonstrate the power and organization of the British magical world. He is known for his tendency to act hastily to appease public opinion.

- Albus Dumbledore (Headmaster of Hogwarts): The most powerful wizard of the time and headmaster of the school. He is the main host of the event and supervisor of the students' safety.
